question:
Write a program that simulates a simple calculator. It reads two operands (int type) and an operator (character type). It performs the following arithmetic operations.
• a + b
• a - b
• a * b
• a / b
• a % b
Sample Output: Input: Enter First Operand: 10 Enter Second Operand: 5 Enter operator: + Output: 10 + 5 = 15
errors: Entire switch statement compressed into one unreadable line
Extremely difficult to read and debug
